piec
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Installing PIEC

Install PIEC using pip:

pip install piec

Driver Dependencies

Depending on your instruments and how you connect to them, you may need additional drivers installed on your system. PIEC itself will install fine without them, but communication with specific hardware will fail if the required driver is missing.

Dependency

When you need it

NI 488.2 (GPIB)

Communicating with any instrument over a GPIB interface

MCC Universal Library (UL)

Using Digilent / MCC DAQ devices (e.g., MCCDig)
